title: Analysis of factors influencing innovative behaviors of intensive care unit nurses using a random forest model-a multicentre cross-sectional study
abstract: Intensive care nurses demonstrated moderately high levels of innovative behaviour. To further enhance innovation capacity, nursing managers should implement tiered information literacy training programs, improve the spiritual climate in Intensive Care Unit environments, facilitate nurse participation in multi-dimensional thriving at work interventions, and encourage highly educated and senior nurses to leverage their strengths.
subject: Nursing
Medicine
